curios.modifiers.soul_stone_slot: When worn in Soul Stone Slot:
flavor.better_soul_stone.test_soul_stone: If you got this, you're definitely a trailblazer.
flavor.better_soul_stone.test_ex_soul_st: If you got this, you're absolutely a trailblazer.
flavor.better_soul_stone.armor_soul_ston: A hero cannot go without pants.
flavor.better_soul_stone.pickaxe_soul_st: Time to mine to your heart's content.
flavor.better_soul_stone.diamond_ore_sou: Finally free from that damn glow lichen!
flavor.better_soul_stone.emerald_ore_sou: Grab a villager and instantly refine them.
flavor.better_soul_stone.ores_soul_stone: "The world is an ore deposit, and I am in charge of packing it up."
flavor.better_soul_stone.copper_soul_sto: We have turned this curse into power.
flavor.better_soul_stone.gold_soul_stone: Sister Xiao Wu, is it really worth it?
flavor.better_soul_stone.emerald_soul_st: Consider the extra portion a tariff.
flavor.better_soul_stone.minecraft_soul_: Notch: Removed Herobrine. Mojang: Removed Notch.
flavor.better_soul_stone.marisa_soul_sto: Legend has it that what Kiri34 borrows, they will return upon death.
flavor.better_soul_stone.player_7_soul_s: Legend has it that PlayerVII takes no damage from anything.
flavor.better_soul_stone.csdy_soul_stone: Legend has it that CSDY punched a Warden to death with bare hands.
text.better_soul_stone.blank_better_soul: A receptacle named after the mod
text.better_soul_stone.copper_ore_soul_s: Picking up Raw Copper summons lightning on you.
text.better_soul_stone.iron_ore_soul_sto: Mining Iron Ore drops an extra Raw Iron.
text.better_soul_stone.gold_ore_soul_sto: Mining Gold Ore has a chance to drop Blaze Rods and Ender Pearls.
text.better_soul_stone.diamond_ore_soul_: Glow Lichen you point at turns into Diamond Ore.
text.better_soul_stone.lapis_ore_soul_st: Mining Lapis Lazuli Ore drops a Bookshelf.
text.better_soul_stone.redstone_ore_soul: Mining Powered Rails drops an extra one.
text.better_soul_stone.debris_ore_soul_s: Mining Netherrack or Basalt drops a Bed.
text.better_soul_stone.ores_soul_stone: Possesses the abilities of all Ore Soul Stones. Pointing at raw ores refines them into corresponding mineral blocks.
text.better_soul_stone.coal_soul_stone: Play well and you'll get diamonds!
text.better_soul_stone.copper_soul_stone: Lightning will not harm you, and it will repair your armor.
text.better_soul_stone.gold_soul_stone: Grants up to three daily uses of invincibility, resisting lethal damage.
text.better_soul_stone.diamond_soul_ston: Damage increased by 500%. Upon taking damage, this effect is disabled for 24 minutes.
text.better_soul_stone.emerald_soul_ston: Trading with villagers yields double items.
text.better_soul_stone.lapis_soul_stone: Grants Fortune III and Looting III.
text.better_soul_stone.redstone_soul_sto: Powers the block beneath your feet.
text.better_soul_stone.ingots_soul_stone: Possesses the abilities of all Ingot Soul Stones. Consumes fire on your body to restore health.
text.better_soul_stone.bone_meal_soul_st: Double-click crouch to release yourself and instantly grow nearby plants.
text.better_soul_stone.minecraft_soul_st: Playing with the power of all Soul Stones is the supreme privilege of the 'Player', the 'World', and 'Minecraft'.
text.better_soul_stone.marisa_soul_stone: Steal a target's loot once upon attack: This is the magic of 'borrowing without returning'!
text.better_soul_stone.player_7_soul_sto: Cannot regenerate health naturally; when worn, your health becomes 1.
When health drops below 1, damage dealt is doubled.
